tasks.subject: P3 Task 0: Parser module — loras_arg.py + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land parse_loras_heredoc + LorasParseError + LorasParseReport + LineError with full unit coverage.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/cli/loras_arg.py + tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/loras_arg.py", "tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse_loras_heredoc empty returns []", "numeric shorthand expands to civitai", "collect-all aggregates errors", "composite (ref, branch) duplicate detection", "LineError has no ref/filename/label field"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 1: Redaction parity tests + AST scan extension
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock down P3-Privacy-1/2 invariants.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_lora_error_redaction.py", "tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_lora_error_redaction.py tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sensitive ref absent from str/repr/render", "loras_arg.py added to scanned files", "LineError AST: no ref/filename/label", "render_for_cli AST: no .text reference"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 2: Resolver kwarg extension — cli_loras
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add keyword-only cli_loras to resolve_active_lora_stack.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/lora.py", "tests/core/test_lora_resolver_p3.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lora_resolver_p3.py tests/core/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cli_loras=None preserves P1", "cli_loras non-None wins", "cli_loras=[] valid empty override", "RedactionRegistry before WARNING", "WARNING count only no refs"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 3: AST scan — precedence-single-source invariant
tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_no_precedence_branches_outside_resolver.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_no_precedence_branches_outside_resolver.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AST scan passes on clean tree", "allow-list documents _cmd_generate hop"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: P3 Task 4: CLI surface — --loras arg + _cmd_generate wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add --loras argparse arg + parse-and-thread to resolver.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py tests/cli/ -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--loras documented in --help", "repeated --loras exits 2", "args.loras threaded as cli_loras kwarg", "LorasParseError renders to stderr exit 1"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
